title: View trending tags on the explore page

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows a list of trending tags
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When the page loads
Then I see a list of trending tags

acceptance_criteria.title: Tags show their post count
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When I look at the tag list
Then each tag shows the number of posts with that tag

title: Filter posts by tag on the explore page

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking a tag filters the post list
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When I click on a tag chip
Then the post list below shows only posts with that tag

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking the active tag again clears the filter
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I have selected a tag filter on the explore page
When I click the active tag again
Then the filter is cleared and all posts are shown

title: View suggested users on the explore page

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows a list of suggested users
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When the page loads
Then I see a list of users to follow

acceptance_criteria.title: Suggested user cards show display name, handle, and bio
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When I look at a suggested user card
Then I see their display name, handle, and bio

acceptance_criteria.title: Suggested user names link to profile pages
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When I see a suggested user card
Then the user name or card links to their profile

title: See a list of posts on the home feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Home feed displays posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I see a list of posts in the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Posts show author display name and handle
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I look at a post card
Then I see the author display name and handle

acceptance_criteria.title: Posts show like and repost counts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I look at a post card
Then I see like count and repost count

title: Load more posts by clicking "Load more"

acceptance_criteria.title: Load more button is visible when more posts exist
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When more posts exist beyond the initial page
Then I see a Load more button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking Load more shows additional posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page and see the Load more button
When I click Load more
Then more post cards appear in the feed

title: Like a post to toggle like state

acceptance_criteria.title: Like button is visible on each post
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I look at a post card
Then I see a like button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking like toggles the liked state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I click the like button on a post
Then the like button shows active state

title: Bookmark a post to toggle bookmark state

acceptance_criteria.title: Bookmark button is visible on each post
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I look at a post card
Then I see a bookmark button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking bookmark toggles the bookmarked state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I click the bookmark button on a post
Then the bookmark button shows active state

title: Compose and publish a new post in the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Compose button is visible on home feed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I see a button to compose a new post

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking compose reveals the composer input
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I click the compose button
Then I see a text input for writing a post

acceptance_criteria.title: Submitting a composed post adds it to the feed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I have opened the composer and typed a message
When I submit the post
Then my new post appears at the top of the feed

title: See the meta banner on the home page

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on home page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I see the meta banner explaining RootFeed is a RootSpec scaffold demo

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner contains link to scaffold commit
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I look at the meta banner
Then I see a link to view the scaffold commit

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner contains link to the spec
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I look at the meta banner
Then I see a link to view the spec

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner contains link to the seed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I look at the meta banner
Then I see a link to view the seed

title: See the RootSpec version in the navigation

acceptance_criteria.title: RootSpec version badge is visible in nav
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit any page
When I look at the navigation bar
Then I see the RootSpec version displayed

title: Navigate between main routes using the navigation bar

acceptance_criteria.title: Navigation bar shows Home, Explore, and Search links
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I look at the navigation bar
Then I see links for Home, Explore, and Search

title: See the footer attribution on every page

acceptance_criteria.title: Footer is visible on home page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I see a footer with RootSpec attribution

acceptance_criteria.title: Footer contains RootSpec version
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I look at the footer
Then I see the RootSpec version string

title: Toggle between dark and light theme

acceptance_criteria.title: Theme toggle button is visible in the navigation bar
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I look at the navigation bar
Then I see a theme toggle button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking the theme toggle switches the active theme
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When I click the theme toggle button
Then the page theme changes

title: View a user's profile page

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows display name and handle
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I see the user display name and handle

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows bio
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I see the user bio text

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows follower and following counts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I see follower count and following count

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows a list of the user's posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I see at least one post by that user

title: Follow and unfollow a user from their profile

acceptance_criteria.title: Follow button is visible on profile page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I see a Follow button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking Follow changes button to Unfollow
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on a user profile page
When I click the Follow button
Then the button changes to Unfollow

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking Unfollow changes button back to Follow
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I have followed a user on their profile page
When I click Unfollow
Then the button changes back to Follow

title: Navigate to a user profile from a post card

acceptance_criteria.title: Author name in post card links to profile
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When I see a post card with an author name
Then there is a link to that author's profile

title: Search posts by keyword

acceptance_criteria.title: Search page has a text input
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the search page
When the page loads
Then I see a search input field

acceptance_criteria.title: Typing a keyword shows matching posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the search page
When I type a keyword that exists in post content
Then I see matching posts in the results

acceptance_criteria.title: Typing a keyword with no matches shows an empty state message
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the search page
When I type a keyword that matches no posts
Then I see an empty state message

acceptance_criteria.title: Empty search input shows no results
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the search page with no query entered
When the page loads
Then no result cards are shown

title: View a single post and its replies

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail page shows the main post content
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post detail page
When the page loads
Then I see the post content

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail page shows the author
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post detail page
When the page loads
Then I see the author display name and handle

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail page shows replies when they exist
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post detail page that has replies
When the page loads
Then I see the replies listed below the main post

title: Navigate to a post detail page from the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Post content in feed card links to post detail
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When I see a post card
Then there is a link to the post detail page

title: See like and repost counts on a post detail page

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail shows like and repost counts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post detail page
When the page loads
Then I see the like count and repost count for the post
